tipRules.tip: Yamamoto Cowboy works as flipping bait and jig trailer. Legs are sturdy but pliable enough to move water. Small appendages catch water and move with slightest shake
Cowboy can be trimmed down for bed fishing - cut tails and appendages to make a small bug with flare for bedding bass or fry guarders

knowledge.insight: Yamamoto Cowboy is very customizable - cut tails, remove appendages, trim profile to change action. Full profile adds bulk as jig trailer, trimmed slicks through cover easier
Cowboy legs are more solid and durable than most flipping baits and jig trailers, yet still pliable enough to move water well
